creator: pat@patmaddox.com
text:
> Is it important to build please using please or simply have the please binary in any way possible?

I don't think it's important to build please with please. I also don't think that's what's happening here... my understanding is that it's simply doing a normal go build.

Very strange that your build would try to download additional dependencies that aren't present in my build.

Only other thing I can think of is poudriere vs poudriere-devel, but I don't know why that might be.
